summary: Completed all 3 phases of hosts/ structural cleanup: rewrote hosts/README.md's obsolete inline-nixosSystem example to document the mkHost factory pattern (required Phase 2), and extracted the inline ISO module from flake.nix into hosts/iso/default.nix for symmetry with hosts/usb-installer/default.nix (optional Phase 3). Discovered and fixed a genuine bug in the plan's suggested pkgs.system closure fix, which causes infinite recursion; used specialArgs-provided system instead. Verified byte-for-byte drvPath equivalence before/after the ISO extraction, and nix flake check output identical to the pre-change baseline throughout.

artifacts.summary: Rewrote Usage section to document mkHost factory pattern (simple + rich forms); refreshed Structure section; added iso to Hosts list and Available hosts line
New file: extracted ISO-specific module body from flake.nix, using specialArgs-provided system instead of pkgs.system to avoid infinite recursion
Replaced inline ISO module function with ./hosts/iso/default.nix path reference; added inherit system; to iso block's specialArgs
Implementation summary with verification details and plan deviations
Final progressive handoff confirming all 3 phases complete

completion_data.completion_summary: Rewrote hosts/README.md to document the current mkHost factory pattern and extracted the inline ISO module from flake.nix into hosts/iso/default.nix, fixing a latent infinite-recursion bug in the plan's suggested pkgs.system approach along the way; nix flake check output and iso drvPath verified unchanged/identical throughout.

next_steps: None required; task complete. Optionally run nixos-rebuild build --flake .#<host> on a live host to confirm full build (excluded from this task's scope per task 68 lineage).
